creator: andoriyu@gmail.com
text:
System is installed as guest in SmartOS KVM. Every time I call `portsnap
update` system goes into a panic.  I can rebuilt whole system (world+kernel)
from the newest svn snapshot with no error, yet portsnap fails.

Here is crash dump: https://dl.dropbox.com/u/963415/vmcore.tgz

How-To-Repeat: portsnap update
